settings.map_alt: Map of Palestine with date palms
settings.subtitle: The sweet taste of Palestine
settings.body: Grown under Jericho sun, our Medjool dates are cultivated in one of the most unique regions on earth. Naturally sweet, and plump, our dates are carefully grown, handpicked, and packed. From palm to table, every Medjool date is nurtured with precision to deliver exceptional flavor and freshness.

settings.heading: Build Your Own Box
settings.subheading:
This Ramadan, choose the products that suit your needs., Choose 5 products from our selected range and enjoy 10% off for building your own Ramadan Box.

A thoughtful way to prepare for Iftar, share the tradition in the Holy Month, or as a meaningful gift for loved ones, crafted by you, from Palestine with love.

settings.heading: Medjool Dates.
settings.body:
“The aroma is rich and sweet, reminiscent of winter puddings... Fabulous-looking dates, unblemished and well presented. Extremely satisfying, with a moreish texture that is fudgy and soft.”
Great Taste Awards Judges 2025

settings.heading: Quality Palestinian Medjoul Dates 907g/2lb
settings.body: Naturally sweet, and plump, our dates are carefully grown, handpicked, and packed by Palestinian hands in Palestine. From palm to table, every Medjool date is nurtured with precision to deliver exceptional flavor and freshness.

settings.title: Farming
settings.body: Our farmers cultivate farms with optimal care, passion and expertise, caring for each palm tree using methods rooted in Palestinian heritage and sustainable practices.

settings.title: Processing
settings.body: After harvest, our dates are cleaned, sorted, and prepared by skilled workers. No additives, no shortcuts, just pure dates.

settings.title: Packaging
settings.body: Our dates are packed with care using food-safe materials that protect the product and maintain its natural integrity, ready to travel from Palestine to your table.

settings.title: Harvesting
settings.body: Dates are handpicked at peak ripeness to preserve their natural sweetness, and nutritional value. Every harvest is done with care to ensure the highest quality.

settings.title: Storage
settings.body: We store our dates in temperature-controlled environments that meet international standards, preserving freshness and preventing moisture loss while keeping the product as close to harvest condition as possible.

settings.title: To the market
settings.body: From farm to box, our process supports transparency, and the livelihoods of Palestinian farmers. Every box of dates is a commitment to quality, sustainability, and dignity.

settings.heading: Break your fast with meaning
settings.paragraph_1: Breaking your fast with a date is a Sunnah. This Ramadan, choose dates that reflect your values — care, integrity, and ethical sourcing.
settings.paragraph_2: Our 100% Palestinian Medjool dates are grown in Jericho on Palestinian-owned farms, cultivated with deep respect for the land and the people who tend it.
settings.paragraph_3: Let your good deeds extend to what you consume. Nourish your body and support Palestinian farmers with every bite.
settings.tagline: Let your table speak for justice.
